svg.title: Master thesis workflow with feedback loop
svg.desc: Five-stage workflow on light background: own RDT CFD wake study, parametric MATLAB design of 18 GV cases, mesh generation, CFD simulation in CFX, and post-processing with a feedback loop back to the screening when the results need adjustment.
svg.text: RDT CFD simulation and wake study
Stage 2 — Parametric guide-vane design in MATLAB
9 CC plus 9 CS, c in {250,...,500} mm
Stage 4 — CFD simulation in ANSYS CFX
18 GV cases plus empty GV domain
Operating point: m_dot = 290.3 kg/s, n = 650 rpm
total-pressure inlet, mass-flow outlet, water at 25 deg C
delta H, swirl number S, UI
input to future RDT GV RPT coupled study
